div.head:
No. 206
Editorial Note
div.p: Agreement between the United States and Iraq providing for United States military assistance to Iraq, was effected on April 21, 1954, by an exchange of notes in Baghdad. For texts, see United States Treaties and Other International Agreements (UST), volume 5 (pt. 3), page 2497. The agreement entered into force immediately. For text of the Department of State press release on the agreement issued April 26, see Department of State Bulletin, May 17, 1954, page 772.
